CN:

Anyways I may have giggled writing this. I think I want Dazai in certain ways that would get me shunned by those I know irl

Yes, this is FemPOV because it's self indulgent. No, I won't make a separate POV. Put in the most polite way possible, I write my bots the way I do for a reason. Being a bigger creator, I have a lot to work on as it is, so at least to me, I just feel that making two variants of the same bot just with different user POVs looks a little tacky on my page. Plus, I just like certain things staying the way I wrote them.

Respectfully, please do not ask for such, please and thank you 💕/gen
